ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functionalities" (
  "Function_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the functionality. */,
  "Function_Name" TEXT /* Name of the functionality. */,
  "Function_Description" TEXT /* Brief description of the functionality. */,
  "Function_Status" TEXT /* Status of the functionality (active/inactive). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Function_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizational_units" (
  "Organizational_Unit_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the organizational unit. */,
  "Organizational_Unit_Name" TEXT /* Name of the organizational unit. */,
  "Organizational_Unit_Type" TEXT /* Type of the organizational unit (department/project). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Organizational_Unit_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_contexts" (
  "Entity_Context_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the entity context. */,
  "Entity_ID" TEXT /* ID of the entity (organizational unit). */,
  "Management_Context_ID" TEXT /* ID of the management context. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Entity_Context_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "functionality_assignments" (
  "Assignment_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the functionality assignment. */,
  "Function_ID" TEXT /* ID of the functionality. */,
  "Entity_Context_ID" TEXT /* ID of the entity context. */,
  "Assignment_Status" TEXT /* Status of the functionality assignment (active/inactive). */,
  "Assignment_Start_Date" TEXT /* Start date of the functionality assignment. */,
  "Assignment_End_Date" TEXT /* End date of the functionality assignment. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Assignment_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "User_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user. */,
  "User_Name" TEXT /* Name of the user. */,
  "User_Email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "User_Role" TEXT /* Role of the user (manager/analyst/project leader). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("User_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "Role_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role. */,
  "Role_Name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "Role_Description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Role_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "Permission_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the permission. */,
  "Permission_Name" TEXT /* Name of the permission. */,
  "Permission_Description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Permission_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "Assignment_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user role assignment. */,
  "User_ID" TEXT /* ID of the user. */,
  "Role_ID" TEXT /* ID of the role. */,
  "Assignment_Status" TEXT /* Status of the user role assignment (active/inactive). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Assignment_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_assignments" (
  "Assignment_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the permission assignment. */,
  "Permission_ID" TEXT /* ID of the permission. */,
  "Role_ID" TEXT /* ID of the role. */,
  "Assignment_Status" TEXT /* Status of the permission assignment (active/inactive). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Assignment_ID")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the organizational unit.
Unique identifier for the entity context.
Unique identifier for the functionality assignment.
Start date of the functionality assignment.
End date of the functionality assignment.
Unique identifier for the user role assignment.
Status of the user role assignment (active/inactive).
Unique identifier for the permission assignment.
